finding_results.notes: Recast Carina's highest-pressure lines into task-anchored, interruption-heavy speech while multitasking (water cup, lunch logistics, sealing leftovers, calling to Leo). finding_results.summary: Carina now speaks in clipped, practical, interruption-driven cadence under pressure, with explicit chore/task anchoring and no equivalent of the previous polished 'sell me neutral' phrasing.
